hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.ar: 61 - خالد بن يحيى بن خالد. رأيت له كتابا في الإمامة كبيرا، سماه " كتاب المنهج ".
hadiths.en: 61 – Khālid b. Yaḥyā b. Khālid.  I saw a large book of his regarding the Imamate.  He named it “book of the method” (kitāb al-manhaj)

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 61, H. 221
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Khālid b. Yaḥyā b. Khālid

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 62. al-Ḥusayn b. Abī al-ʿAlā, al-Khaffāf, Abū ʿAlī
hadiths.ar: 62 - الحسين بن أبي العلاء، الخفاف، أبو علي، مولى بني عامر.
hadiths.en: 62 – al-Ḥusayn b. Abī al-ʿAlā, al-Khaffāf, Abū ʿAlī, client of the Banū ʿAmir.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 62, H. 222
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: al-Ḥusayn b. Abī al-ʿAlā, al-Khaffāf, Abū ʿAlī
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › al-Ḥusayn b. Abī al-ʿAlā, al-Khaffāf, Abū ʿAlī

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 63. Sahl b. Ziyād, Abū Saʿīd al-Ādamī, al-Rāzī
hadiths.ar: 63 - سهل بن زياد، أبو سعيد، الآدمي، الرازي. كان ضعيفا في الحديث، غير معتمد فيه، وكان أحمد بن محمد بن عيسى يشهد عليه بالغلو والكذب، وأخرجه من قم إلى الري، وكان يسكنها. وقد كاتب أبا محمد العسكري (عليه السلام) على يد محمد بن عبد الحميد العطار، للنصف من شهر ربيع الآخر سنة خمس وخمسين ومئتين.
hadiths.en: 63 – Sahl b. Ziyād, Abū Saʿīd al-Ādamī, al-Rāzī.  He was weak in ḥadīth, not relied upon in it.  Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. ʿĪsā attested to ghulw and lying against him, and exiled him from Qum to Rayy, and he used to reside in it.  He had corresponded with Abū Muḥammad al-ʿAskarī upon the hand of Muḥammad b. ʿAbd al-Ḥamīd al-ʿAṭṭār, for the middle of Rabīʿ al-Ākhir in the year 255.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 63, H. 223
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: Sahl b. Ziyād, Abū Saʿīd al-Ādamī, al-Rāzī
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › Sahl b. Ziyād, Abū Saʿīd al-Ādamī, al-Rāzī

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 64. ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm, al-Hamdānī, Abū Muḥammad
hadiths.ar: 64 - علي بن إبراهيم، الهمداني، أبو محمد. كانت له وصلة بأبي الحسن (عليه السلام).
hadiths.en: 64 - ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm, al-Hamdānī, Abū Muḥammad.  He had a connection with Abū al-Ḥasan  عليه .

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 64, H. 224
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm, al-Hamdānī, Abū Muḥammad
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › ʿAlī b. Ibrāhīm, al-Hamdānī, Abū Muḥammad

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 65. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn
hadiths.ar: 65 - القاسم بن محمد بن أيوب بن شمون. كان من وجوه الشيعة، لكن لم يرو شيئا.
hadiths.en: 65 – al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn.  He was from the noteworthy of the Shīʿa, however he did not narrate anything.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 65, H. 225
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
reference.chapter: al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn
reference.location: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa. › al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn

hadiths.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
hadiths.chapter: 66. Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Quḍāʿa b. Ṣafwān b. Mihrān, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Ṣafwāni
hadiths.ar: 66 - محمد بن أحمد بن قضاعة بن صفوان بن مهران، أبو عبد الله، الصفواني. ما أنكرت منه شيئا إلا ما يرويه [عن أبيه] عن جده، عن الصادق (عليه السلام)، فإنه شيء غير معروف، وقد رأيت فيه مناكير مكذوبة عليه. وأظن الكذب من قبل أبيه.
hadiths.en: 66 – Muḥammad b. Aḥmad b. Quḍāʿa b. Ṣafwān b. Mihrān, Abū ʿAbdillāh, al-Ṣafwāni.  I have not disclaimed anything from him except for what he narrates from his father from his grandfather from al-Sadiq  عليه السلام , for it is something unknown and I have seen unrecognized (matters) in it, untrue against/upon him.  And I suspect that the lying was by his father.

reference.citation: Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafāʾ (Rijāl Ibn al-Ghaḍāʾirī), Ch. 66, H. 226
reference.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
